PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\harun\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\常駐用\\旭\\HP"; $dst = "C:\\dev\\HP-build"; if \(-not \(Test-Path "C:\\dev"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "C:\\dev" | Out-Null }; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { Remove-Item -Path $dst -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dst | Out-Null; robocopy $src $dst /E /XD node_modules dist .git out /XF build.log debug.log error.log vite.log /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS; Write-Output "ROBOCOPY_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(Push-Location "C:\\dev\\HP-build"; npm install 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30; Write-Output "INSTALL_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; Pop-Location)
PowerShell(Push-Location "C:\\dev\\HP-build"; npm run build 2>&1; Write-Output "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; Pop-Location)

PowerShell($origDist = "C:\\Users\\harun\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\常駐用\\旭\\HP\\dist"; if \(Test-Path $origDist\) { Remove-Item -Path $origDist -Recurse -Force }; robocopy "C:\\dev\\HP-build\\dist" $origDist /E /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS; Write-Output "COPYBACK_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; Get-ChildItem $origDist -Recurse | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)
